text: Title: API Development Guidelines Tags: engineering, api, rest Type: guideline ---------------------------------------- # API Development Guidelines All APIs should follow REST standards. Best Practices: - Use proper HTTP methods - Validate request payloads - Return JSON responses - Include status codes - Write API documentation

Title: Engineering Coding Standards Tags: engineering, quality, clean-code Type: guideline ---------------------------------------- # Engineering Coding Standards Maintained code quality ensures system scalability and seamless collaboration. Standards: - Follow language-specific style guides (e.g., PEP 8 for Python) - Keep functions small and focused on a single responsibility - Write meaningful unit tests covering at least 80% of new code - Ensure every PR goes through at least one peer review
nit tests covering at least 80% of new code - Ensure every PR goes through at least one peer review before merging

Title: Customer Support Workflow Tags: support, operations, helpdesk Type: procedure ---------------------------------------- # Customer Support Workflow Standard operational workflow for resolving client queries efficiently. Workflow: - Tier 1: Initial triage and basic troubleshooting within 2 hours - Tier 2: Escalation to technical support specialists if unresolved - Tier 3: Critical bugs assigned directly to the engineering triage team - Always follow up with the customer to confirm satisfact
ed directly to the engineering triage team - Always follow up with the customer to confirm satisfaction before closing a ticket

Title: Database Backup SOP Tags: infrastructure, database, backup Type: procedure ---------------------------------------- # Database Backup SOP Procedures to safeguard company data assets against loss or corruption. SOP Details: - Automated snapshots are taken every 4 hours and stored in AWS S3 - Full database logical backups are completed nightly at 02:00 UTC - Retain daily backups for 30 days, monthly backups for 1 year - Perform a simulated recovery test on the first Monday of every month
monthly backups for 1 year - Perform a simulated recovery test on the first Monday of every month

Title: CI/CD Deployment Process Tags: devops, cicd, deployment Type: procedure ---------------------------------------- # CI/CD Deployment Process Standard operating procedure for moving code from staging to production. Steps: 1. Trigger automated testing pipeline on the release branch 2. Verify all checks pass and manual QA sign-off is granted 3. Initiate blue-green deployment via the orchestration platform 4. Monitor system metrics and error logs for 15 minutes post-release 5. Execute rollback
on platform 4. Monitor system metrics and error logs for 15 minutes post-release 5. Execute rollback strategy immediately if anomalies are detected

Title: Employee Onboarding SOP Tags: hr, onboarding, sop Type: procedure ---------------------------------------- # Employee Onboarding SOP All new employees must complete onboarding within 5 days. Steps: 1. Create company email 2. Join Slack workspace 3. Setup development environment 4. Read security policies 5. Attend orientation meeting

Title: FloCard Overview Tags: product, overview, nfc Type: documentation ---------------------------------------- # FloCard Overview FloCard is a digital business card platform that allows professionals to share contact information instantly using QR codes and NFC technology. Key Features: - Digital profiles - QR sharing - Team management - Analytics dashboard

Title: Company Leave Policy Tags: hr, benefits, policy Type: policy ---------------------------------------- # Company Leave Policy Our leave policy ensures employees get adequate rest and personal time. Guidelines: - 20 days of paid annual leave per calendar year - Up to 10 days of sick leave with medical certificate - Maternity leave (26 weeks) and Paternity leave (4 weeks) - All leave requests must be submitted via the HR portal 2 weeks in advance
must be submitted via the HR portal 2 weeks in advance

Title: Security Policy Tags: security, compliance, policy Type: policy ---------------------------------------- # Security Policy Employees must never share passwords. Security Rules: - Use MFA authentication - Rotate passwords every 90 days - Report phishing emails - Lock systems when away
